description: Trigger evaluation cases for skill-quality-standard. Tests that the skill is selected when users ask about building skills, debugging triggers, or evaluating skill quality — and NOT selected for unrelated tasks.

cases.query: I want to build a new skill for generating weekly summary reports
cases.rationale: Direct request to build a new skill

cases.query: why isn't my skill being triggered when I ask about stock analysis
cases.rationale: Debugging skill trigger failure — core use case

cases.query: how do I write a good skill description that actually gets selected
cases.rationale: Asking about description writing — explicitly covered

cases.query: my skill's trigger rate is too low, how do I fix it
cases.rationale: Trigger rate improvement — core topic

cases.query: what's the three-layer architecture for OpenClaw skills
cases.rationale: Three-layer architecture is Module 2 of this skill

cases.query: how do I commission a skill properly before adding it to capabilities
cases.rationale: Commissioning is Module 4

cases.query: I need to evaluate my skill quality, where do I start
cases.rationale: Skill quality evaluation — directly in title and description

cases.query: prove that my skill works before I mark it as activated
cases.rationale: Evidence-based commissioning — Step 3

cases.query: what are the skill design principles I should follow
cases.rationale: Design principles are explicitly mentioned in description

cases.query: what goes in references versus assets in a skill directory
cases.rationale: Three-layer architecture question — Module 2

cases.query: use the ghost-blog skill to publish my article about investing
cases.rationale: Using an existing skill to solve a business problem — explicitly excluded

cases.query: run the premarket scan for today
cases.rationale: Stock market task, completely unrelated to skill development

cases.query: translate this paragraph to Chinese
cases.rationale: Translation task — unrelated to skill development

cases.query: generate a cover image for my article
cases.rationale: Image generation task — unrelated

cases.query: what's the stock price of 603496
cases.rationale: Stock price lookup — completely unrelated

cases.query: write a python script to process CSV files
cases.rationale: General coding task — unrelated to skill development

cases.query: send an email to the team about the meeting tomorrow
cases.rationale: Communication task — unrelated

cases.query: summarize this article about AI in healthcare
cases.rationale: Content summarization — not skill development

cases.query: what did we decide last week about the product roadmap
cases.rationale: Memory recall task — unrelated

cases.query: help me think through the restaurant expansion strategy
cases.rationale: Business strategy consulting — unrelated to skill development
